code:
import io

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  match string.parse_int(string.trim(s))
  when Some(n)
    mut i = 1
    while i <= n
      if i % 15 == 0
        println("FizzBuzz")
      else if i % 3 == 0
        println("Fizz")
      else if i % 5 == 0
        println("Buzz")
      else
        println("#{i}")
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
when None
  ()
end
